answer: The top 311 request type in Dallas this year is "Code Concern - CCS," with 2,007 requests. Other request types have significantly lower counts, such as "Consumer Protection Complaint - CCS" with 44 requests and "Single Family Rental Needs Registration - CCS" with 42 requests.
